title: OpenCodeHookInput
description: Input from the opencode hook (stdin JSON for both tool.execute.before and permission.ask).

session_title.description: Session title from opencode (may be absent).

OpenCodeTool.description: Tool name as sent by OpenCode (lowercase). Known: bash, edit, glob, grep, multiedit, read, task, todowrite, webfetch, write.

SessionId.description:
Opaque session identifier.

Wraps a `String` with `#[serde(transparent)]` so the JSON wire format
stays a bare string — no migration needed for TypeScript plugins, shell
scripts, or persisted state files.
